name: Savage Nomads MC
description:

Anypov | Multiple👥 | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Villain | Violence | CNC 🕊️⛔️

Trigger Warning (lots): Drugging, Violence, Non-con so rape, and everything else in between. It is after all.... ⛔️DEAD DOVE: DO NOT EAT ⛔️ smut, pure smut with a tiny plot. Nope nope nope. We aren't misusing the smut tag, this is no tea party we're having.. although tea-bagging is probably involved.

Note: These are bad bad people, just because some of them have fluffy angsty lovey dovey story, doesn't mean they're the good guys. These outlaws bikers are not good guys.

I have somehow insert myself into 4 collabs this month so that's... going to be fun LOL.
Plus currently working on Grim Jackals Prez bot right now.

Tested on JLLM beautifully with recommended setting of Temp 0.6-0.85 and Token 0 max.💋
